channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Amnesty International Condemns Detention of Bashir Kurfi Over Comments on Security Crisis
item.description: Amnesty International has condemned the detention of public affairs analyst Dr. Bashir Kurfi, calling it arbitrary and an attack on freedom of expression. Kurfi was detained by Katsina State Police ov...

item.title: Maharashtra Experiences Multiple Tremors in Nanded, Hingoli, and Parbhani
item.description: A recent seismic event has caused multiple tremors in the districts of Nanded, Hingoli, and Parbhani in Maharashtra. According to official sources, the tremors occurred between 1:37 AM and 3:23 AM, re...

item.title: Kenya establishes sovereign wealth fund to manage resource revenues
item.description: President William Ruto has signed the Sovereign Wealth Fund Bill 2026 into law, creating a national investment vehicle to preserve Kenya's natural resource revenues for future generations. The legisla...

item.title: UN Resolution Aims to Combat Neglected Tropical Diseases Globally
item.description: The United Nations has approved a resolution to address neglected tropical diseases, which affect over one billion people worldwide, mainly in low-income regions of Africa, Asia, and Latin America. Th...

item.title: Nigeria's Renaissance Energy aims to revive dormant Niger Delta oil field
item.description: Renaissance Africa Energy has initiated plans to develop the JK oil field in Nigeria's Niger Delta, a former Shell asset first explored in 1967 but left idle for over five decades. The project follows...

item.title: Zuleika Lopez visits the Senate for administrative coordination ahead of her impeachment trial testimony
item.description: Office of the Vice President (OVP) chief-of-staff Zuleika Lopez arrived at the Senate on Thursday, one day after the Senate impeachment court issued a subpoena ad testificandum directing her to testif...

item.title: Leaders Warn Civil Society to Prioritize National Interest Over Foreign Influence
item.description: President Bola Tinubu and Lagos State Governor Babajide Sanwo-Olu have cautioned civil society organisations (CSOs) against undue foreign influence, urging them to ensure Nigeria’s national interest r...

item.title: Winnipeg Jets Partner With Bloomington Bison for ECHL Affiliation
item.description: The Winnipeg Jets and Manitoba Moose have ended their partnership with the Norfolk Admirals after three seasons, announcing a new one-year affiliation agreement with the Bloomington Bison of the ECHL....

item.title: Saccharine explores eating disorders and cultural pressures through body horror
item.description: Saccharine is an Australian supernatural body horror film that delves into the complexities of eating disorders and societal pressures surrounding body image. The story follows Hana, a Japanese-Austra...

item.title: Monsoon Continues in Delhi with Orange Alert; Kerala Faces Heavy Rain
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued an 'Orange Alert' for Delhi, signaling heavy rainfall across the national capital, which has led to waterlogging in areas like New Delhi Railway St...

item.title: Trump Launches Fresh Attacks on Iran After Ceasefire Declaration
item.description: President Donald Trump has escalated tensions with Iran by declaring the ceasefire 'over' and initiating new bombing raids following accusations that Iran's leaders are 'cuckoo' and 'scum'. At the NAT...

item.title: New Observations Suggest Milky Way's Spiral Arms Are Larger Than Previously Believed
item.description: Astronomers have discovered that the Milky Way's spiral arms may extend farther and wider than previously thought, using data from NASA's Chandra X-ray Observatory and the European Space Agency's XMM-...

item.title: Christopher Nolan praises Samantha Morton’s role in 'The Odyssey' as he recalls Heath Ledger’s legacy
item.description: Christopher Nolan has lauded Samantha Morton's performance in his new film adaptation of Homer's 'The Odyssey', drawing a parallel to the late Heath Ledger's iconic portrayal in 'The Dark Knight'. The...

item.title: BC Parks Launches Fundraising Campaign to Acquire Private Parcel for Myra Bellevue Park Conservation
item.description: The BC Parks Foundation has initiated a fundraising campaign to acquire a 32-hectare privately-owned parcel within Myra Bellevue Provincial Park, aiming to protect a critical biodiversity hotspot and ...

item.title: Kenyan Woman Graduates as US Air Force Medical Technician After Joining Military
item.description: Shiko Hope Wa Njeri, a Kenyan woman working in the US Air Force, has graduated from the Basic Medical Technician Corpsman Program at Fort Sam Houston, Texas. She moved to the US via the Diversity Visa...

item.title: Tragic head-on collision on N2 claims five lives near Heidelberg
item.description: A devastating head-on collision on the N2 near Heidelberg on Tuesday morning resulted in the deaths of five individuals, including a 13-year-old boy, his 20-year-old brother, their parents, and Michel...

item.title: Israeli strike kills Gaza aid worker during World Cup screening event
item.description: An Israeli strike in Gaza killed Mohamed al-Wahidi, a top Palestinian aid official working with Egypt's relief arm, during a FIFA World Cup screening event organized for the Egypt-Argentina match. The...

item.title: Nigel Farage Resigns as MP for Clacton, Plans to Run Again
item.description: Nigel Farage, the UK Independence Party leader, has announced his resignation as MP for Clacton, triggering a by-election. Despite claims of seeking to challenge 'the establishment' and clear his name...

item.title: FIFA Investigates Racist Abuse Against US Streamer IShowSpeed
item.description: The International Football Federation (FIFA) has launched an investigation into reports of racist abuse directed at US content creator and streamer IShowSpeed. The probe follows allegations that the s...

item.title: Controversial Lawyer Brian Mwenda Purchases High-Value SUV
item.description: Brian Mwenda, the controversial lawyer at the center of a fake credentials scandal, has sparked online reactions after showcasing a brand new Land Rover Defender worth over KSh17 million. The video re...
